BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"2. I do not expect things to work out for me.","Q2":"1. I have failed more than I should have.","Q3":"2. I get very little pleasure from the things I used to enjoy.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"0. I don't feel I am being punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"2. I criticize myself for all my faults.","Q8":"2. I would like to kill myself.","Q9":"0. I don't cry anymore than I used to.","Q10":"2. I am so restless or agitated that it's hard to stay still.","Q11":"2. I have lost most of my interest in other people or things.","Q12":"1. I find it more difficult to make decisions than usual.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"2. I feel more worthless as compared to other people.","Q15":"2. I don't have enough energy to do very much.","Q16":"2+. I sleep a lot  more than usual.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"1. I can't concentrate as well as usual.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"1. I am less interested in sex than I used to be."}
